hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; echo "$cmd" | grep -q "git commit" && git log -1 --format="%B" 2>/dev/null | grep -qi "co-authored-by.*claude\|co-authored-by.*anthropic" && echo "WARNING: Last commit contains AI Co-Authored-By trailer — remove it" || true'
bash -c '[[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" == *"cmake/deps.cmake"* ]] && echo "BLOCK: cmake/deps.cmake is protected. Confirm explicitly before editing." && exit 2 || exit 0'
echo 'REMINDER: If you completed tasks from a tracker, re-read the tracker file and confirm all items are marked done before reporting completion.'
